body:
S205 Income Tax (Trading and Other Income) Act 2005

Any overlap relief not used on a change of accounting date (see BIM81090) is given in full in the tax year in which the business ceases.

Example

The business in the example at BIM81090 ceases on 31 May 2020. The overlap profit available for relief is £25,002.

The basis periods for the final 2 years are:

Year

-

-

2019-2020

Year 10

12 months to 31 October 2019

2020-2021

Final year

7 months from 1 November 2019 to 31 May 2020

The profits for the 7 months to 31 May 2020 are £80,000. Overlap relief for the remaining overlap profits (£25,002) is deducted to give taxable profits for 2020-2021 of £54,998.

The total profits taxed over the life of this business will exactly equal the total profits made.
title: Computation of liability: overlap relief - given on cessation
